subject: Congrats! You Are On The Presale List
body:
You are officially on the presale list for the new book $100M Leads Volume II. Stay tuned for updates.

Hi there,

I'll keep this short. Three things:

- Congrats! You are officially on the pre-sale list for my next book $100M Leads Volume II. Last time, we sold out. But now, you get first dibs :)
- If you don't have my first book, $100M Offers, you can grab it for $0.99.
- I don't send many emails. But if I do, it's because I think you'd like it.

Welcome to #Mozination,

Alex

P.S. Doing $3M+? Want to triple your business? Click here to start.
